i18n.available is the raw config list, never validated against on-disk lang dirs → silent wrong-locale render
validation.php is shipped on disk but excluded from LANG_FILES, so validation strings never reach the JS dictionary
i18n.locale comes from app()->getLocale() while available stays underscore-normalized → LocaleSwitcher Select can show empty value
LocaleController allowlist + SetLocaleMiddleware compare against un-normalized availableLocales(), so a hyphenated config locale is unreachable
useArqelTranslations rebuilds the dict object every render → useCallback dependency [dict] changes identity each render, defeating memoization
